Operation.xpath: /Defs/ThingDef[(defName="Amorphous_1x1Rug" or defName="Amorphous_1x2Rug" or defName="Amorphous_2x2Rug" or defName="Amorphous_2x3Rug" or defName="Amorphous_3x3Rug" or defName="Amorphous_3x4Rug" or defName="Amorphous_4x4Rug")]/designationCategory

/Defs/ThingDef[(defName="Amorphous_1x1Rug" or defName="Amorphous_1x2Rug" or defName="Amorphous_2x2Rug" or defName="Amorphous_2x3Rug" or defName="Amorphous_3x3Rug" or defName="Amorphous_3x4Rug" or defName="Amorphous_4x4Rug") and not(designationCategory)]
